case_title: MORALES, NEMENCIO VS MEJIA, MAGDALENO et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, NEMENCIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, MAGDALENO SANTIAGO, MARK SANTIAGO, JESUS $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,605.00, DISMISS AS TO DEFENDANT JESUS SANTIAGO WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS MEJIA AND MARK SANTIAGO TO PAY $1750.00 EACH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
